generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic planner, I've seen firsthand how our allies are falling behind on defense spending. While some argue we should reduce our commitment, the reality is that cutting back now would leave us vulnerable. We've seen what happens when deterrence weakens - it's not just about money, it's about sending a clear message. Our allies need to step up, but in the meantime, we can't afford to weaken our own position. The threats we face are real, and our commitment is what keeps us safe. #NationalSecurity #AllianceStrong
